main_product.title: MATEPROX Waterproof Dry Bag, 20L Floating Dry Pouch Beach Bags for Kayaking Boating Rafting with Large Waterproof Phone Pouch-Black

details.title: MATEPROX Waterproof Dry Bag, 20L Floating Dry Pouch Beach Bags for Kayaking Boating Rafting with Large Waterproof Phone Pouch-Black
details.description:
• 【PREMIUM WATERPROOF MATERIAL】The dry bag backpack waterproof is made of thick, hard-wearing, high-frequency, seamlessly welded material that is waterproof and light enough to carry; the buckles and clips are made of heavy-duty nylon, which is tough and does not break easily.
  • 【OUTDOOR ACTIVITIES SET】Available in 3 sizes (5L/10L/20L), this waterproof sling bag is a great gift for women or men. Each drybag comes with a 10.1 "large waterproof phone pouch for full waterproofing for your water sports. ***Notes: Align seals roll down tightly 3 times when packing the drybag in case of leaking water.
  • 【SHRINKAGE DESIGN】MATEPROX has developed a webbed shrinkage design specifically for 10L/20L dry sack waterproof bags. The waterproof bag can be adjusted according to the size of the object to be placed inside each time, adding convenience to outdoor trips.
  • 【WIDE APPLICATION & VERSATILITY】This waterproof duffel bag is perfect for all outdoor activities - beach, boating, kayaking, rafting, fishing, camping, hiking, snorkeling, biking, skiing, surfing, sailing... It can be used as a supplemental emergency flotation device as well as a bucket for outdoor camping fishing activities!
  • 【AFTER-SALE SERVICE】MATEPROX offers a one-year warranty for our customers. If you have any questions or problems, feel free to contact us at any time. We will respond within 24 hours and help you resolve it.

all_reviews.reviewText: This bag is great! Fully waterproof, looks good and not too big so I can take it with me on the keyak. Has lots of plastic loops on the front so I can easily secure it to cargo netting. Comes with TWO removable straps so it can be used as a small backpack. And the phone bag works great too!
all_reviews.itemName: MATEPROX Waterproof Dry Bag, 5L Floating Dry Pouch Beach Bags with Large Waterproof Phone Pouch-Black

all_reviews.reviewText: So far it seems like it should work for what i need it for...a day at the beach.  It was nice to have a phone protecter from water and sand.  The bag is roomy enough to hold all of my items, towel, lotions, etc. The shoulder straps were easy to attach and should help carrying the bag. the color makes it easy to spot.  The external bungy type straps will come in handy for sandals or towel. looking forward to using it.
all_reviews.reviewTitle: should be efficient for a day at the beach
all_reviews.itemName: MATEPROX Waterproof Dry Bag, 10L Floating Dry Pouch Beach Bags for Kayaking Boating Rafting with Large Waterproof Phone Pouch-Yellow

all_reviews.reviewText:
This wet-proof bag has proven essential throughout academy training. Its moisture-resistant design keeps wet gear separate and protected, while the durable build and organized compartments handle daily use with ease. A dependable choice for rigorous training and professional demands, camping, the boat or the beach! Anywhere that it's wet. 
 
This fits a towel and PT gear
all_reviews.itemName: MATEPROX Waterproof Dry Bag, 5L Floating Dry Pouch Beach Bags with Large Waterproof Phone Pouch-Black

all_reviews.reviewText: This worked very well while kayaking, on rapids, to keep my snacks and cell phone dry on a camping trip.  Definitely recommend.
all_reviews.itemName: MATEPROX Waterproof Dry Bag, 5L Floating Dry Pouch Beach Bags with Large Waterproof Phone Pouch-Black

all_reviews.reviewText: bought this for a kayaking trip and it worked well, good storage capacity and well built. the additional phone case worked as expected and kept my phone dry.
